name: discover
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.worlds.every(w => w.privacy === 'public' || w.can_edit === true)
_note: sub_worlds.discover is the cross-user gallery: it surfaces PUBLIC worlds always and unlisted/private only to their owner/editors. Archived worlds are excluded. Empty input ⇒ ok:true with a worlds array + total count. query/kind filter; sort ∈ popular|recent|favorites; limit is fail-CLOSED via badNumericField (poisoned NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308 ⇒ ok:false bad_numeric_field). The privacy invariant pins that no non-public world leaks to a non-editor viewer. Live STATE + actor — never no_db.
